name: Banshee
description: Banshee’s call heralds death. She maintains crowd control and identifies enemy weak points with sonic attacks. Few can hold their position when struck by her force.
passiveDescription: Weapon noises are hushed so that enemies cannot hear them.

abilities.name: Sonic Boom
abilities.description: Banshee emits a sonic shockwave that pushes targets in range with enough force to incapacitate or kill attackers.

abilities.name: Sonar
abilities.description: Using acoustic location, Banshee's Sonar power finds and tracks enemies, and exposes critical weak spots to everyone in your squad.

abilities.name: Silence
abilities.description: Using Silence surrounds Banshee in an aura that stuns enemies and will limit their perceptions and tactical response to gunfire and Warframe attacks.

abilities.name: Sound Quake
abilities.description: Channeling all of her acoustic energy into the environment, Banshee uses ultrasonic reverberations to violently shake the ground.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Banshee’s call heralds death. She maintains crowd control and identifies enemy weak points with sonic attacks. Few can hold their position when struck by her force.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Banshee Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Banshee Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Banshee Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Changed Banshee's Sonic Fracture (Augment) armor reduction to be permanent.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Banshee’s Sound Quake and Caliban’s Razor Gyre not working correctly. 
Fixed camera shake issues with Banshee’s Sound Quake.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Enemies that are not affected by CC can now be armor stripped by Banshee’s Sonic Boom, Xaku’s Gaze, and Ember’s Fire Blast.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.8
patchlogs.changes: Echoes Of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.8:

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.7
patchlogs.changes: Echoes Of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.7:

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.5
patchlogs.changes: Echoes Of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.5:

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.4
patchlogs.changes: Echoes Of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.4:

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes:
Echoes Of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3:
Unleash lethal acrobatics or a cacophony of chaos! Get the prismatic Mirage Prime and bombastic Banshee Prime along with their Prime Weapons and exclusive Accessories from the Prime Vault.
Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime
Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime Glyphs
Banshee Prime Warframe
Banshee Prime Glyphs
Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Rhino Prime & Nyx Prime, Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lech Kril respawning inside the ground if he was pushed off the map with a push ability (Banshee Sonic Boom etc) in his fight alongside Vor.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: We now usher in a new “None” era! All Warframes and Warframe Skins that previously did not have the ‘None’ option will have a “None” Attachment or Syandana option, giving you even MORE customization flexibility. This means you can remove details such as any attachments on Ember Pyraxis, Mag Prime, the list goes on and on! In addition, Banshee, Frost and Oberon's default Shoulder Armor can now be equipped on Prime versions of the Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: This should resolve issues with Ivara’s Prowl, Loki’s Hushed Invisibility, Banshee’s passive

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.0.8 + 30.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee and Mirage Relics in the drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee Prime’s System Blueprint has been changed (for real) from Rare to Uncommon, as announced here.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime return alongside their Prime Weapons and exclusive Customizations for a limited time. Frost Prime Packs, Ember Prime Packs, and their Relics have returned to the Vault.
Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables!
*Banshee Prime’s System Blueprint has been changed from Rare to Uncommon, as announced here.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
The damage immunities apply to movement abilities, such as Banshee’s Sonic Boom, to prevent yeeting the Necramech into the sun. The diminishing returns are present to also prevent 1HKOs 
Improved performance when playing with Banshee.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee: 15 to 100
Banshee Prime: 65 to 125

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Ayla, Misa Prime and Pyra Syandana offsets on Banshee Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Banshee Soprana’s skirt and cloth attributes to reduce clipping with her derriere.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted holster position for Dual Secondaries on Banshee Prime so they sit a little higher.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Sound Quake

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee Sonar reading "CRITICAL MULTIPLIER" when it’s actually "DAMAGE MULTIPLIER".

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Icarius Syandana offsets that got a bit wonky on Mag, Banshee, Nekros, Saryn, and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Syrinx Leg Plates partially clipping into the Banshee's leg.
Fixed the Nosos Syandana clipping when equipped on the Banshee Soprana Skin.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated theme texture icons for all Warframe Skins/Helmets for Ash, Atlas, Banshee, Chroma, Ember and Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed offsets for several TennoGen Syandanas on Banshee Prime.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Blade of the Lotus Skin by BeastBuster

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes: Updated the LOC for Banshee’s Sound Quake Augment to “Forgoes channeling to create a shockwave that deals 20x damage at the epicenter, gradually weakening as it expands out".

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Resoquake only consuming 25 Energy when it is supposed to use 100 (on Clients, it would require having at least 100 Energy, but wouldn't use it).

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies sometimes not getting back up after being hit by Banshee’s Resonating Quake.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Dominia Helmet by led2012

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a shader issues with Limbo and Banshee.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting Nyx’s Absorb or Banshee’s Soundquake when hitting an enemy with a "grappling hook weapon" allowing you to move around.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Banshee's Sonar in Team-based Conclave overriding team-markers, resulting in opponent team seeing red markers for each other.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Banshee’s Sonar.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Silent stopping the Conculyst Whirlwind attack, rendering the Sentient invincible.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee's Sound Quake doing slightly less damage at low frame-rates (1.7% less at 30 FPS, 0.8% at 60 FPS).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a bug that would cause Banshee's Silence to last longer depending on your frame-rate (approximately 5% longer at 60 FPS, 30% longer at 30 FPS).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee's Silence range and duration increased in Conclave.
Banshee's Sonic Quake damage increased and range decreased in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed aggressive flickering lighting when loading into Warframe with Banshee Prime on the diorama.
Fixed Banshee being able to cast a perpetual Soundquake by initiating a handshake then pausing.
Fixed the Teplo Syandana sitting too high on Banshee Prime and Banshee Prime with the default Banshee skin.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Update 19.12.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Banshee Sound Quake ability causing her Syandana to fly straight up.
Fixed Banshee Prime’s Helmet antennas flying straight up during her Sound Quake ability.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5:
Various visual tweaks to Banshee’s Sound Quake to address feedback.
Banshee’s Sound Quake range FX will now only appear for the local player due to epileptic precautions and reports.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.4
patchlogs.additions: The lucky few who won early Banshee Prime Access, rejoice! She's here for you with this hotfix on PC. Will the rest of us 'losers' be able to get a sneak peek at the lucky winners frames? Will they be kind enough to share?
patchlogs.changes: Banshee’s Sound Quake now has a visual indicator of it’s Range and Energy colored crack FX in the ground when cast (perhaps a little prep for her Prime?).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee’s Echo Helmet (TennoGen) is now untradable, as are all other TennoGen items. This was never intended to be possible.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ash Carabid & Banshee Echo helmets not being improved by Arcanes

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee Echo Helmet by Rekkou

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Silence ability permanently turning off enemy barks.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Decreased range and damage of Banshee’s Sonic Boom in Conclave
Increased angle of Banshee’s Sonic Boom in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee
Decreased channeling cost of Banshee’s Sound Quake in Conclave.
Decreased damage of Banshee’s Sonic Boom in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an animation issue seen in Banshee’s Diorama.
Fixed Banshee’s Idle animation displaying incorrect FX.

patchlogs.name: Update: Lunaro
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed incorrect Channeling FX on Banshee's Soprana skin as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/640736-banshee-soprana-skin-channel-effects/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.11.0 & 18.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Pakal shoulder attachment not appearing on Banshee.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed hearing headshot sounds during while Banshee's Silence is active. 
•    Fixed Banshee’s Silence freezing Sargas Ruk during his boss fight.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Inaros’ Dessicate and Banshee’s Sonic Boom range has been increased and now hit in a 40 degree FOV.
Fixed Banshee’s Sonar created outdated enemy markers on the minimap.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Banshee’s Sonic Boom, Silence, and Sound Quake will no longer be able to push, stun, or stagger boss-type enemies.
Fixed Banshee’s Sonar Resonance Augment not properly functioning when an enemy is ragdolled during the killing blow.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Sound Quake audio FX still playing after a Host Migration occurs.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of Banshee’s Sonic Boom in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Banshee’s Sonar indefinitely stacking Resonance in the same location without a delay.
Fixed Banshee’s Sonar visual FX displaying as super bright.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Trinity, Nova, Loki and Banshee can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue preventing some abilities (such as Nyx’s Absorb or Banshee’s Sound Quake) from being deactivated using the Power Menu.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes:
Added Apex particles to Banshee’s Push and Valkyr’s Paralysis.
Added visual trails FX to Banshee’s Ability powers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Banshee’s idle animation as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/503338-banshee-idle-animation-particle-bug/.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: This helmet is worn by Banshee, and adds Power Efficiency, but reduces duration of Aim Glide and Wall Latch.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.10.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies focusing their attacks on player Sentinels after Banshee’s Silence has been cast.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Sonic Fracture Mod not affecting all enemies when used by Clients as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/465697-sonic-fracture-inconsistency/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Sonic Fracture FX lingering if the target became immediately ragdolled.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oberon and Banshee’s Immortal Skin not properly applying to their shoulder pads.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.additions: Banshee and Vauban Noggles have been added to the Market!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Resonance Augment Mod not functioning.

patchlogs.name: Mesa Update
patchlogs.changes: Enemies affected by Banshee’s Savage Silence Mod are now open to finishes while under the effects of crowd control.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a bug that was incorrectly scaling Syandanas down on Banshee, Nova and Valkyr by 20%. This should address some physics issues with Syandanas on these Warframes too.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: Energy Vampire will no longer provide energy to Banshees performing Sound Quake so as to prevent infinite energy usage.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes:
• Banshee's Sonar, and the Enemy Radar/Sense mods ignore security cameras and turrets.
• Banshee’s Sonar now uses Energy Colour.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Banshee's Immortal Skin always appearing white.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx, Banshee, and Hyrdoid's toggle-able powers being broken by pause menu.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee’s Silence now includes new Aura and stun properties.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Shifted Banshee's shoulder pad back slightly to reduce clipping.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.8.0: Breeding Grounds
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where Banshee’s Silence FX does not disappear when the power duration is cancelled by a teleport volume (falling off map and respawning).

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the positioning of Chest Armor on Ember, Banshee, Valkyr, Zephyr, Vauban, Saryn, and Nyx.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issue where Banshee’s Sonar was not recastable. Please note we are still working on fixing the timer not appearing for Clients, but the recast-ability has been fixed.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked Banshee's Sound Quake sound effects.
Fixed a number of abilities having a cool down discrepancy between host and client. This includes Banshee’s Sonar, Nekros’s Terrify, and Ember’s Fireblast.
Fixed an issue with players getting stuck in Banshee’s Sound Quake animation if cast right as they entered into the downed state.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes:
Both toggling changes to Nyx and Banshee will give players more freedom instead of being locked in place while the rest of your team runs around.  It should also add a nice element of resource management to both Warframes, rather than being stuck in place at the cost of X energy.
Banshee’s Sonar
Tweaked the ability and energy visuals on numerous Warframes including Rhino, Frost, Nova, Ash, Banshee, Zephyr, Vauban, Volt and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Fixed alternate helmets for Valkyr, Banshee, and Saryn missing from the market.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.changes: Improved the code performance on Banshee's Sonic Boom ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Imperator Syandana appearing on Banshee’s waist.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee's Sonar effects lingering after enemies have been killed.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.1.0: Grinlok
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Sonar not showing enemies on clients.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Loki/Banshee Immortal skins not being tintable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr BP image being Banshee.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Fixed “power in use” issue after using Banshee’s Sonic Boom ability

patchlogs.name: Update 10.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Power change: Banshee’s Sonic Boom stunlock’s opponents. A cooldown of 5 seconds has been added to Sonic Boom in Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.7.1: Double Resource Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee’s Sonar leaving mini-map icons for dead enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Banshee Silence effect not using correct energy colours

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for crash with Banshee “Soundquake” if gore was disabled.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee Sonar "power in use" issue

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for clients not seeing Banshee’s silence.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Banshee’s Silence ability not affecting enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee's Sound Quake has been balanced to do more intended damage amounts on use.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed mods not affecting Banshee’s sonar power.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee Soundquake power that was causing visibility issues for other players (not the caster).

patchlogs.name: Update 7.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Banshee 'Push' power not working against Chargers

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.3: Level Expansions And New Weapons!
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee blueprints moved to the uncommon pool

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7 Hot-Fixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed descriptions for Saryn/Banshee alt helmets

patchlogs.name: Update 7 - "stormbringer"
patchlogs.fixes: Banshee
